input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.3.1
            TITLE: configuration and location - the primary master switch must meet t.9.3

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.3.1: Configuration and Location - The Primary Master Switch must meet T.9.3
IC.9.3.1 Configuration and Location - The Primary Master Switch must meet T.9.3

final_answer: Configuration and Location - The Primary Master Switch must meet T.9.3
